enum_values.name: Off
enum_values.description: Clock security system disabled (clock detector OFF)

enum_values.name: On
enum_values.description: Clock security system enable (clock detector ON if the HSE is ready, OFF if not)

enum_values.name: Bypassed
enum_values.description: HSE crystal oscillator bypassed with external clock

fields.name: HSIKERON
fields.description: HSI always enable for peripheral kernels

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.description: MCO output disabled, no clock on MCO

fields.description: Wakeup from Stop and CSS backup clock selection

enum_values.description: HSI oscillator selected as wakeup from stop clock and CSS backup clock

enum_values.name: LSE
enum_values.description: LSE oscillator clock used as RTC clock

enum_values.name: LSI
enum_values.description: LSI oscillator clock used as RTC clock

enum_values.name: HSE
enum_values.description: HSE oscillator clock divided by a prescaler used as RTC clock

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: LSESYS only enabled when requested by a peripheral or system function

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: LSESYS enabled always generated by RCC

enum_values.name: NoFailure
enum_values.description: No failure detected on LSE (32 kHz oscillator)

enum_values.name: Failure
enum_values.description: Failure detected on LSE (32 kHz oscillator)

enum_values.name: Off
enum_values.description: CSS on LSE (32 kHz external oscillator) OFF

enum_values.name: On
enum_values.description: CSS on LSE (32 kHz external oscillator) ON

enum_values.name: Bypassed
enum_values.description: LSE crystal oscillator bypassed with external clock
